productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess 3S Rain Jkt Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Navy hooded rain jacket made of 100% nylon, has a mesh lining, long raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs, foldaway hood with lace drawstring, zippered front opening with velcro flap, hand warmer pockets on the sides with press stud closures, elasticated hemline, brand name on the upper left chest in reflective print, iconic white stripes on the sleeves and reflective fabric details Fit Regular Wash care Wash in water below 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo Look cool when it pours in this navy jacket from adidas. The iconic 3-Stripes on the sleeves and the brand name on the upper chest adds to the brand image, while the nylon fabric and the mesh lining keeps you feeling dry. Team this with tracks, tees and performance shoes for a jog in the park when it's drizzling or wear it with jeans and tees for casual wear. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
